using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Models;

private readonly DiaExceptionNotificationOptions _options;

public DiaExceptionNotificationService(
    ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService> logger,
    IDataverseRepository dataverseRepository,
    IOptions<DiaExceptionNotificationOptions> options)
{
    _logger = logger;
    _dataverseRepo = dataverseRepository;
    _options = options.Value;
}


LogErrorProcessName = _options.ProcessName,
SenderConfigKey = _options.SenderConfigKey,
RecipientConfigKey = _options.RecipientConfigKey,
LogType = _options.ErrorLogType
